CustomField.description: Optional. API name of the field where the error message should be displayed. If blank, the error appears as a page-level error. Use field API names without the object prefix (e.g., "Status__c" not "Account.Status__c").
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field API name to display error on (e.g., "Status__c"). Leave blank for page-level error.
CustomField.label: Error Display Field
